name: hwp_apply_weekly_txt
description: Apply a UTF-8 weekly report .txt (sections 1–6) into an .hwp file that uses the same layout as 오합지졸 주간보고서. Saves a new .hwp (Hangul replaces line-by-line; duplicate lines in section 2 may need manual edit).

report_date_line_old.title: Report Date Line Old
report_date_line_old.description: Exact '보고 일자' line in the current HWP (e.g. 2026년  3 월 17일). Optional.

report_date_line_new.title: Report Date Line New
report_date_line_new.description: Replacement line for 보고 일자. Optional.
